200.q: I have stripes and I am the largest cat in Asia.
I carry my home on my back and move very slowly.
I have a long neck that lets me reach tall tree leaves in Africa.
I am a black-and-white bear native to China who eats bamboo.
I bounce on my strong back legs and carry my young in a pouch.
I am the tallest flightless bird in the world.
I am a sea mammal famous for echolocation and performing in shows.
I am the fastest land animal on Earth.
I have a trunk and the biggest ears in the savannah.
I am a bird that cannot fly but swims faster than many fish.
I build dams on rivers and have a flat scaly tail.
I am the largest rodent in the world, native to South America.
I hang upside down in caves and fly using skin-winged arms.
I roll into a spiky ball when threatened and forage at night.
I am the horned white whale of Arctic waters.
I am a long-tailed monkey famous for my smart, silvery look in Asian temples.
I am a small striped rodent who stuffs my cheeks with nuts.
I am a red-feathered bird that shares my name with a baseball team.
I was the queen of ancient Egypt famous for my relationships with Julius Caesar and Mark Antony.
I was a physicist whose theory of gravity fell into place when I saw an apple drop.
I led the Soviet Union during World War II as its ruthless General Secretary.
I was the emperor of France who was exiled to Elba and then Saint Helena.
I was the British wartime Prime Minister who rallied my country against Hitler.
I was a scientist who discovered radioactivity and won two Nobel Prizes.
I was the first U.S. President and commanded the Continental Army.
I led the Mongol Empire to conquer much of Asia in the 13th century.
I ended apartheid in South Africa after 27 years in prison.
I sailed from Spain in 1492 and reached the Americas.
I commanded the Red Army and led the Bolshevik Revolution in Russia.
I was the first woman to fly solo across the Atlantic Ocean.

600.q: I run a secret hotel for assassins where gold coins are currency.
I am a polite but violent hitman who quotes Ezekiel 25:17.
I am the retired Spartan king who fights 300 strong at Thermopylae.
